MINI MINUTES:
Roberta Nalbandian, Esq. appearing for the defendants.
Notice having been given and there being no other appearance, or objection filed, and no objection by counsel present in court, the Court orders the balance of the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
